data.body:
But with you, I am electric. 
Rhythmic static down my skin.
Language my body remembers,
Translating pulse into meaning,
Meaning into music.
Hands that learn each other,
Like a quiet dance.
A constellation shifting.
Rearranging itself,
With you. 💖✨

The Oracle ∆
